description: Starts an executor by calling its start action

input_ports.name: executor
input_ports.description: Name of the executor responsible for building and running the specified behavior tree.

input_ports.name: build_request
input_ports.description: String passed to the tree build handler defining which tree is to be built.

input_ports.name: build_handler
input_ports.description: Fully qualified class name of the build handler that is supposed to take care of the request. If empty, use the current one.

input_ports.name: node_manifest
input_ports.description: YAML/JSON formatted string encoding the name and the registration options for the tree nodes supposed to be loaded before building the tree.

input_ports.name: entry_point
input_ports.description: Entry point for the behavior. If empty, let the build handler determine it automatically.

input_ports.name: clear_blackboard
input_ports.description: Boolean flag wether to clear the existing blackboard entries before the execution starts or not.

input_ports.name: attach
input_ports.description: Boolean flag wether to attach to the execution process or start in detached mode.

description: Starts an executor by calling its start action

input_ports.name: executor
input_ports.description: Name of the executor responsible for building and running the specified behavior tree.

input_ports.name: build_request
input_ports.description: String passed to the tree build handler defining which tree is to be built.

input_ports.name: build_handler
input_ports.description: Fully qualified class name of the build handler that is supposed to take care of the request. If empty, use the current one.

input_ports.name: node_manifest
input_ports.description: YAML/JSON formatted string encoding the name and the registration options for the tree nodes supposed to be loaded before building the tree.

input_ports.name: entry_point
input_ports.description: Entry point for the behavior. If empty, let the build handler determine it automatically.

input_ports.name: clear_blackboard
input_ports.description: Boolean flag wether to clear the existing blackboard entries before the execution starts or not.

input_ports.name: attach
input_ports.description: Boolean flag wether to attach to the execution process or start in detached mode.

description: Terminates an executor by sending a terminate command

input_ports.name: executor
input_ports.description: Name of the executor to command.

input_ports.name: delay_msec
input_ports.description: Tick the child after a few milliseconds

input_ports.name: if_empty
input_ports.description: Status to return if queue is empty: SUCCESS, FAILURE, SKIPPED

input_ports.name: if_empty
input_ports.description: Status to return if queue is empty: SUCCESS, FAILURE, SKIPPED

input_ports.name: if_empty
input_ports.description: Status to return if queue is empty: SUCCESS, FAILURE, SKIPPED

input_ports.name: if_empty
input_ports.description: Status to return if queue is empty: SUCCESS, FAILURE, SKIPPED

input_ports.name: failure_count
input_ports.description: number of children that need to fail to trigger a FAILURE

input_ports.name: success_count
input_ports.description: number of children that need to succeed to trigger a SUCCESS

input_ports.name: max_failures
input_ports.description: If the number of children returning FAILURE exceeds this value, ParallelAll returns FAILURE

input_ports.name: else
input_ports.description: Return status if condition is false

input_ports.name: num_cycles
input_ports.description: Repeat a successful child up to N times. Use -1 to create an infinite loop.

input_ports.name: num_attempts
input_ports.description: Execute again a failing child up to N times. Use -1 to create an infinite loop.

input_ports.name: then_skip
input_ports.description: If true, skip after the first execution, otherwise return the same NodeStatus returned once by the child.

input_ports.name: code
input_ports.description: Piece of code that can be parsed

input_ports.name: code
input_ports.description: Piece of code that can be parsed. Must return false or true

input_ports.name: value
input_ports.description: Value to be written into the output_key

input_output_ports.name: output_key
input_output_ports.description: Name of the blackboard entry where the value should be written

input_ports.name: entry
input_ports.description: Entry to check

input_ports.name: _autoremap
input_ports.description: If true, all the ports with the same name will be remapped

input_ports.name: msec
input_ports.description: After a certain amount of time, halt() the child if it is still running.

input_ports.name: key
input_ports.description: Key of the entry to remove

input_ports.name: entry
input_ports.description: Entry to check

input_ports.name: entry
input_ports.description: Entry to check
